Patch Set 1:

@Adrian, 

The issue is that the job detected a tag already present as "5.0.0" in the repo:
https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/admin/projects/externalapi/nbi,tags
So it it assuming there is a release 5.0.0 already present but I don't see any:
https://nexus.onap.org/content/repositories/releases/org/onap/externalapi-nbi/nbi-rest-services/

I don't know why this tag was applied but is up to you if you either:
- Want me to remove the tag 5.0.0 and let the job re-tag the repo
- Release a new releases file under a different version number

Let me know
